summary: Rejected: 2 required check(s) failed. readme_sufficient: README text is absent.; execution_success: No primary flow or command completed successfully.

policy.description: Repository URL must be present and non-empty.
README must explain purpose and basic usage (heuristic: ≥150 chars, contains usage/install keywords).
Repository should be public and open-source (heuristic based on URL).

check_results.reasoning: Repository appears to be on a public hosting platform.

policy.description: Project must not require a shared special review account.

check_results.reasoning: No indication of a required special review account.

policy.description: Project must not have been submitted to another competition (manual confirmation required).

check_results.reasoning: Manual confirmation required; assumed OK pending human review.

policy.description: Web projects must have a live demo URL on an accepted hosting platform.
Demo URL must not use local/tunnel hosts (localhost, ngrok, cloudflared, duckdns, render.com are invalid).

check_results.reasoning: Demo host 'myapp.vercel.app' passes the allowed-host check.

policy.description: At least one primary flow or command must complete successfully.

check_results.reasoning: No primary flow or command completed successfully.
